title: Emerald Expansion
description: Adds new emerald armors, emerald geodes and more emerald related items to the game!
body: AEM (Another Emerald Mod) adds two new tiers; Emerald and Emerald Netherite. Full Emerald or Emerald Netherite Armor provides infinite villager sales and luck effect. Mod also adds Emerald Geodes and Emerald Lantern, which is crafted with iron nuggets and emeralds.
